"'''From the Files of Corellia Antilles'''" was an article written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] and published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 14]]. It detailed several archaeological artifacts and described the nature of archaeology in the [[New Republic era]] from the [[in-universe]] perspective of Dr. [[Henrietya Antilles|Corellia Antilles]].

==Continuity==
*The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Tombs on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]
*[[Empress Teta's Crown Jewels]]
*[[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]
*[[Uueg Tching]]'s ''[[Sayings]]''
*[[Holocron/Legends|Holocrons]]
*The [[Cirra Mace]]
*The [[Loag Dagger]]
*The [[Shrine of Kooroo|Shrines of Kooroo]]
*The [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Emperor's Shadow (shuttle)|Yacht]]
*[[Sharka'k Noor]]
